title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1518 - Duration of personal jurisdiction
text:
454.1518.  Duration of personal jurisdiction. — Personal jurisdiction acquired by a tribunal of this state in a proceeding under sections 454.1500 to 454.1728 or other law of this state relating to a support order continues as long as a tribunal of this state has continuing, exclusive jurisdiction to modify its order or continuing jurisdiction to enforce its order as provided by sections 454.1527, 454.1530, and 454.1545.
(L. 2011 H.B. 260) 
Effective 6-15-16, see § 454.1728
